posts.text: Company: Dee Development Engineers Ltd Sector: Industrials - Process Piping M.cap - 4900 Cr What does the Company Do ? Dee Development Engineers is India’s largest specialized engineering and manufacturing company focused on process piping systems by capacity. The company primarily caters to high-capex sectors such as power generation, oil & gas, petrochemicals, and other process industries, where piping systems form a critical part of plant infrastructure, typically accounting for around 10–15% of total project cost. As part of specialized process piping solutions, Dee also manufactures and s…
